home.title: Save Life
home.subtitle: Connecting Blood Donors with Hospitals
home.description: Save Life is a platform that bridges the gap between blood donors and hospitals in need. Get instant alerts when your blood type is needed nearby.
home.hospital_description: Register your hospital to request blood from nearby donors
home.donor_description: Join our network of life-saving blood donors
home.step1_description: Hospitals and donors register on our platform
home.step2_description: Hospitals request blood, donors get instant alerts
home.step3_description: Donors respond and hospitals connect directly
home.footer: Connecting donors with hospitals to save lives.

hospital.registration_description: Register your hospital to connect with blood donors. Your registration will be reviewed by our admin team.
hospital.registration_success: Registration submitted successfully! Please wait for admin approval.
hospital.login_description: Access your hospital dashboard to request blood

donor.registration_description: Join our network of life-saving blood donors. Get alerts when your blood type is needed nearby.
donor.whatsapp_note: Leave blank if same as phone number
donor.registration_success: Registration successful! You'll receive alerts when your blood type is needed.

admin.login_description: Access the admin panel to manage hospital registrations
admin.pending_description: Review and approve hospital registrations with RBC certificates
admin.approved_description: Hospitals that have been verified and approved
admin.rejection_prompt: Please provide a reason for rejecting
